examples: Few city hotels can outclass the Hotel de Crillon.
Computers match people in some roles, and when fast decisions are needed in a crisis, they often outclass them.
If we play to our strengths we should outclass most sides in this group and present a real challenge in Austria and Switzerland in the summer of 2008.
With luck, they will outclass the stereotypes that precede them, starting with Selena Gomez.
It may outclass much of the competition, but the firm faces a challenge convincing consumers that the camera is as good as rivals' featuring 13 megapixels or more.
